title: Semantic Diff Check
description: A tool for semantic comparison of text changes that goes beyond simple string matching to understand meaning and context.

title: Big Mac Energy Converter
description: A whimsical energy unit converter that translates various energy measurements into Big Mac equivalents. My first vibe-coded app using GPT-2!

title: Library of Babel
description: A digital implementation of Borges' infinite library concept, generating and searching through all possible combinations of text.
